sentence: 他喜欢发短信，不喜欢打电话。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān fā duǎnxìn, bù xǐhuān dǎ diànhuà.
english: He likes to send text messages rather than make phone calls.

sentence: 她站在门口向我们挥手告别。
pinyin: Tā zhàn zài ménkǒu xiàng wǒmen huīshǒu gàobié.
english: She stood at the doorway waving goodbye to us.

sentence: 路由器放远了信号就会变弱。
pinyin: Lùyóuqì fàng yuǎn le xìnhào jiù huì biàn ruò.
english: If the router is placed too far away, the signal will weaken.

meaning: 1. to say candidly; 2. to acknowledge frankly
sentence: 他坦言自己当时确实很紧张。
pinyin: Tā tǎnyán zìjǐ dāngshí quèshí hěn jǐnzhāng.
english: He frankly acknowledged that he was indeed very nervous at the time.

sentence: 这个地区淡水资源十分稀缺。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū dànshuǐ zīyuán shífēn xīquē.
english: Fresh water resources are extremely scarce in this region.
